message:
feat(ubs): add TOON_BIN env var for toon_rust tr support

- Add TOON_BIN env var (default: toon) to specify TOON encoder binary
- Users can set TOON_BIN to toon_rust's tr binary for 10x faster encoding
- Fixes UUOC: use "$TOON_BIN" < file instead of cat | toon
- Document TOON_BIN in help text

Example: TOON_BIN=/path/to/toon_rust/tr ubs --format=toon .

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -144,6 +144,8 @@ trap on_err ERR
 PROJECT_DIR="."
 # Format precedence: CLI > UBS_OUTPUT_FORMAT > TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT > "text"
 FORMAT="${UBS_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-${TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT:-text}}"  # text|json|jsonl|sarif|toon
+# TOON encoder binary (default: toon; set to path of toon_rust tr for better performance)
+TOON_BIN="${TOON_BIN:-toon}"
 CI_MODE=0
 FAIL_ON_WARNING=0
 VERBOSE=0
@@ -237,6 +239,8 @@ Environment Variables:
   UBS_OUTPUT_FORMAT=FMT       Default output format (text|json|jsonl|sarif|toon)
                               Overridden by --format CLI flag
   TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT=FMT     Global fallback format if UBS_OUTPUT_FORMAT not set
+  TOON_BIN=PATH               TOON encoder binary (default: toon)
+                              Set to toon_rust tr path for 10x faster encoding
   UBS_MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB=N       Max directory size in MB before refusing to scan (default: 1000)
                               Set to 0 to disable this safety check
   UBS_REFUSE_HOME_ROOT=0|1    Whether to refuse scanning \$HOME or / (default: 1)
@@ -2474,18 +2478,19 @@ case "$FORMAT" in
       emit_env_error_json
       status=2
     else
-      # Check if toon (TOON encoder) is available (UBS_TEST_FORCE_NO_TOON=1 forces fallback for testing)
-      if [[ "${UBS_TEST_FORCE_NO_TOON:-0}" != "1" ]] && command -v toon >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+      # Check if TOON encoder is available (UBS_TEST_FORCE_NO_TOON=1 forces fallback for testing)
+      # TOON_BIN can be set to toon_rust's tr binary for better performance
+      if [[ "${UBS_TEST_FORCE_NO_TOON:-0}" != "1" ]] && command -v "$TOON_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
         if generate_combined_json; then
-          cat "$COMBINED_JSON_FILE" | toon
+          "$TOON_BIN" < "$COMBINED_JSON_FILE"
         else
-          if ! merge_json_scanners | toon; then
+          if ! merge_json_scanners | "$TOON_BIN"; then
             say "${RED}$X could not produce TOON output${RESET}"
             [[ "$status" -lt 1 ]] && status=1
           fi
         fi
       else
-        say_err "${YELLOW}Warning: toon (TOON encoder) not found in PATH; falling back to --format=json${RESET}"
+        say_err "${YELLOW}Warning: $TOON_BIN (TOON encoder) not found in PATH; falling back to --format=json${RESET}"
         if generate_combined_json; then
           cat "$COMBINED_JSON_FILE"
         else
